summary: Leaderboard and Classroom Management APIs (Phase 3) testing complete. All 6 features pass. Fixed 1 critical bug: is_current_player validation error in leaderboard endpoint.

1_leaderboard_submit.details: POST /api/leaderboard/results submits game results and creates/updates high scores. Works for both authenticated users and guests. Returns 404 for non-existent game_id.

2_leaderboard_fetch.details: GET /api/leaderboard/game/{gameId} returns top scores with rank, player_name, score, accuracy, time_seconds, max_combo. Supports ?type=accuracy|score|time and ?limit=N parameters.

3_player_stats.details: GET /api/leaderboard/player/stats returns aggregated stats including total_games_played, unique_games, avg_score, avg_accuracy, highest_score, recent_games. Requires authentication.

4_class_create.details: POST /api/classes creates a class with auto-generated 8-character join_code. Supports name, description, grade_level, subject fields. Requires authentication.

5_class_join.details: POST /api/classes/join/{code} allows authenticated users to join via join_code. Returns success:true with class_id, class_name, student_id. Returns 'Already enrolled' if already in class.

6_integration_providers.details: GET /api/classes/integrations/providers returns 6 providers: google_classroom, canvas, clever, classlink, powerschool, schoology. Each has id, name, description, features array.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: In leaderboard.py line 156, expression 'current_user and doc.get("player_id") == current_user.get("id")' returns None (not False) when current_user is None, causing Pydantic validation error for is_current_player field
bugs_fixed.fix: Wrapped expression with bool() to ensure boolean output: 'bool(current_user and doc.get("player_id") == current_user.get("id"))'

critical_code_review_comments: LMS/SIS integrations (Google Classroom, Canvas, Clever) are MOCKED - framework only with TODO placeholders for actual API calls
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test classes and game results during testing. Existing class with join_code 6222DD75 was used for join tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leaderboard and Classroom APIs fully working. Key endpoints: POST /api/leaderboard/results (submit score), GET /api/leaderboard/game/{id} (get leaderboard), GET /api/leaderboard/player/stats (player stats), POST /api/classes (create class), POST /api/classes/join/{code} (join class), GET /api/classes/integrations/providers (list LMS providers). Auth token format: {"token": {"access_token": "..."}}, not {"token": "..."}. Integration providers are framework only - actual OAuth flows not implemented.

mocked_apis.status: Framework implemented with TODO placeholders for actual API calls
